---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a product, UX, orchestration, or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the feature you want.

## Why It Matters

Explain how this improves usability, productivity, clarity, or output quality.

## Suggested UX

If this affects the UI, describe the ideal user flow.

## Suggested Engine Behavior

If this affects orchestration, explain:

- which session type it applies to
- whether it changes prompting, escalation, checkpoints, branching, or synthesis
- whether it should be visible to all users or advanced-only

## Alternatives Considered

List any other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, screenshots, or references if helpful.
